title: Capstone Scope, Dependency Graph, Milestones, and Risk Control · Claim Audit: Scope Thesis
summary: The plan is organized by components and deadlines rather than prerequisite evidence, risk retirement, end-to-end value, and independent assessment gates. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone scope thesis increment in evidence-ordered capstone delivery system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract.
Exercise a real stop, rescope, substitute, or pivot decision when evidence crosses a predeclared threshold.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Scope Thesis · Theory Scope Thesis
steps.instruction:
theory case — Component deadlines conceal prerequisite gaps, external waits, integration risk, missing evidence milestones, and no trigger for releasing scope. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Scope Thesis contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Scope Thesis · Theory Scope Thesis.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for state the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract. For Predict Scope Thesis · Theory Scope Thesis, keep Scope Thesis connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Component deadlines conceal prerequisite gaps, external waits, integration risk, missing evidence milestones, and no trigger for releasing scope. The theory variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Scope Thesis condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

options.text: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
A flexible broad vision is better than a bounded capstone thesis. That claim does not survive the predict scope thesis evidence boundary.

content.text: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Component deadlines conceal prerequisite gaps, external waits, integration risk, missing evidence milestones, and no trigger for releasing scope. The worked example variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract. A defensible solution applies Scope Thesis, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-ordered capstone delivery system.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-5
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A flexible broad vision is better than a bounded capstone thesis. This fails the Scope Thesis contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation (GitHub Docs current 2026-07-15) — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: State the bounded product thesis, users, decision, outcomes, exclusions, quality floor, and credential claims in one falsifiable contract.
